ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString: ResetForm(Form1_2); UpdateContext({ newMode: false, editMode: false, CurrentItem: First(Table1_2.SelectedItems), isItemSelected:false });
ResetForm(Form1_2); UpdateContext({ newMode: false, editMode: false, CurrentItem: First(Table1_2.SelectedItems), isItemSelected:false });

If(
    !IsBlank(varBarcodeData.ItemID),
    Coalesce(
        LookUp(GTIN_Lookups, GTIN = varBarcodeData.ItemID, ItemName),
        "Unknown Item - " & varBarcodeData.ItemID
    ),
    Parent.Default
)

If(
    !IsBlank(varBarcodeData.ItemID),
    Coalesce(
        LookUp(GTIN_Lookups, GTIN = varBarcodeData.ItemID, ItemManufacturer),
        "Unknown Manufacturer"
    ),
    ThisItem.Manufacturer_Lookup
)

Notify(
    "Error: " & If(
        newMode, 
        "Failed to create item: ", 
        "Failed to update item: "
    ) & Self.Error, 
    NotificationType.Error,
    5000
)
If(IsBlank(varSelectedManufacturer), Blank(), Filter(Sort(Distinct(Inventories, cr31c_manufacturer_lookup), Value), Value = varSelectedManufacturer))

If(
    IsBlank(ManufacturerDropdown.Selected),
    Set(varSelectedManufacturer, Blank()),
    Set(varSelectedManufacturer, ManufacturerDropdown.Selected.Value)
)
If(And(Inventory.Size = ScreenSize.Small, Or(newMode, isItemSelected)), false, true)
"Are you sure you want to delete this record?"
